premise: My in-laws manipulated my dying husband into signing over our $300,000 startup equity to 'protect' it from me, then evicted me and our baby from our apartment. Six years later I was hired as CFO of the company that acquired their business — I found the fraudulent transfer, clawed it all back with interest, and bankrupted them.
